# Swiftscope

> Swiftscope (https://www.swiftscope.com.au) is quoting and job management
> software for Australian trade businesses -- electricians, plumbers,
> carpenters, roofers and other trades. Tradies build and send professional
> quotes from their phone in under 4 minutes, mark up plans and drawings,
> manage jobs, and export to Xero. Pricing is $45/month flat with a 3-day
> free trial. Swiftscope also runs a public directory where homeowners can
> find verified local tradies and request quotes for free.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.swiftscope.com.au/): product overview for tradies
- [Features](https://www.swiftscope.com.au/features): quoting, plan markup, AI drawing analysis, job management, Xero export
- [How it works](https://www.swiftscope.com.au/how-it-works): the quote-on-site workflow explained
- [Get quotes](https://www.swiftscope.com.au/get-quotes): homeowners describe a job and receive quotes from local tradies
- [Directory](https://www.swiftscope.com.au/directory): browse verified local trade businesses
- [Sign up](https://www.swiftscope.com.au/signup): start a 3-day free trial
- [Log in](https://www.swiftscope.com.au/login): existing account sign-in

## For homeowners

Requesting quotes through Swiftscope is free. Describe the job, and local
tradies on the platform respond with quotes.

## For trade businesses

Swiftscope replaces spreadsheets and paper quoting: price book import from
supplier CSVs, reusable job packages, margin controls, quote PDFs, digital
acceptance, and accounting export. Built for small teams of 1-10.
